title: papaver × godronii
intro: Papaver × godronii, also known as the Godron's poppy, is a natural hybrid of the Papaver somniferum and Papaver rhoeas species. This plant contains alkaloids, including morphine, codeine, and thebaine, which have been utilized for their medicinal properties, primarily in the treatment of pain and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Papaver × godronii include its ability to act as a cough suppressant, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The plant is often used to prepare herbal medicines, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although proper dosing and preparation are crucial due to the plant's potency.
